name: Adenosine
description: A naturally occurring molecule that activates receptors responsible for collagen synthesis and skin repair.
scientificSummary: Adenosine is an endogenous purine nucleoside approved by the Korean FDA for anti-wrinkle claims.
mechanismOfAction: Binds adenosine receptors (A2A and A2B) to trigger a cascade that upregulates collagen production and matrix metalloproteinase inhibition.

seo.title: Adenosine - Clinically Proven Anti-Wrinkle Ingredient | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Adenosine firms skin and reduces wrinkles through proven receptor-mediated collagen synthesis.
